summary: Spec review allows the Harbor #219 runtime API admission smoke PR. The spec keeps scope to App/Core-facing Harbor Runtime API startup and fixture-only readiness/provider/session/evidence plumbing. It does not close Harbor #12 user stories or claim App/Core packaged E2E, live site execution, real account/profile/Cookie use, production page actions, submit/publish/send, hosted browser, marketplace, batch collection, or risk-control bypass.
